Techno Brain is a leading digital technology ﬁrm providing products and services across regions and empowering lives through 
innovation and skills transfer with operations in Africa, USA, India, UK and UAE.
Techno Brain is committed to deliver high quality, cost effective and off-the-shelf solutions to Governments, NGOs and 
Private organizations across the globe.
